$comment: Documents the shape of data/country-index.json and per-country content files like data/kiribati.json. Not machine-enforced — scripts/import-countries.php reads these files directly — but kept here as the single reference for anyone adding new country content files.

country_index_entry.name: string — official CIA World Factbook name, using Factbook's own alphabetization convention (e.g. 'Bahamas, The', 'Korea, North'). This becomes the WordPress post_title verbatim.
country_index_entry.continent: string — one of: Africa, Asia, Europe, North America, South America, Oceania.
country_index_entry.region: string — a Factbook-style sub-region, e.g. 'Southeast Asia', 'Caribbean'.

country_content_file.name: string — must exactly match a 'name' in country-index.json.
country_content_file.excerpt: string — one or two sentence summary used as the meta description fallback and archive card blurb.

quick_facts.population: string — kept as Factbook-formatted text (e.g. '119,940 (2023 est.)'), not a bare number.

facts_and_lists.interesting_facts: string[] — one fact per array item, joined with \n on import.

prayer_and_mission.prayer_intro: string — original or licensed content only, never copied from Operation World or similar copyrighted sources.
